calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jul-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's motion for an order striking the claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Councial Council Form Interrogatories; Petitioner'S First Set Ofdemand For Production And Inspection Of Documents
Off Calendar Apr-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Respondent is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
